data.title: Wall Street Rockets As February Inflation Cools More Than Expected
data.description: Stocks surged Wednesday morning, with major indices poised to snap a two-day losing streak, as cooler-than-expected inflation reinforced expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts in 2025.

data.title: Vast Renewables Stock Rallies After It Announced AUD180 Million Funding From ARENA For Clean Energy Project
data.description: Vast Renewables (NASDAQ: VSTE) secures AUD180 million for Port Augusta project from Australian Renewable Energy Agency (ARENA). VS1 to provide 24/7 carbon-free power and support decarbonization.

data.title: Roche Further Boosts Obesity Pipeline With Zealand Pharma Deal Worth $5.3 Billion For Weight Loss Drugs
data.description: Roche partners with Zealand Pharma on obesity drug petrelintide, with a $5.3B deal including milestone payments and global commercialization rights.

data.title: Nokia Powers Canal+ Telecom's Fiber Network Expansion In The Caribbean
data.description: Nokia and Canal+ Telecom have partnered to expand broadband access in the Caribbean by enhancing fiber networks in French Guiana and Guadeloupe. This collaboration aims to deliver multi-gigabit Fiber-to-the-Home (FTTH) services, bridge the digital divide, and foster economic growth.

data.title: Why Is Fashion Retailer Vera Bradley Stock Plunging Today?
data.description: Vera Bradley shares dropped in premarket after reporting disappointing Q4 FY25 earnings, with a 25% sales decline to $99.96 million, missing analyst expectations. The company also posted an adjusted EPS loss of $0.30 and a significant gross margin contraction.
